summary: AWS Live Streaming (IVS + MediaPackage) Phase B integration testing complete. All backend APIs (8/8 tests passed) and all frontend UI elements verified successfully. Both services connected to real AWS.
seed_data_creation: Test channels created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: AWS Live Streaming (IVS + MediaPackage) Phase B is fully implemented and tested. Both services connect to real AWS in us-east-1 region. Frontend accessible at /aws-livestream via Tools dropdown > Live Streaming. IVS supports STANDARD/BASIC channel types with LOW/NORMAL latency modes. MediaPackage supports 4 packaging formats: HLS, DASH, MSS, CMAF.

features_tested.GET /api/aws-livestream/status: PASSED - Returns available:true for both IVS and MediaPackage
features_tested.POST /api/aws-livestream/ivs/channels: PASSED - Creates IVS channel with playback_url, stream_key_value, ingest_endpoint
features_tested.GET /api/aws-livestream/mediapackage/for: PASSED - Returns 4 formats (hls, dash, mss, cmaf)
features_tested.POST /api/aws-livestream/mediapackage/ch: PASSED - Creates MediaPackage channel with ingest_endpoints
features_tested.Frontend /aws-livestream page: PASSED - Page loads with service status cards showing 'Connected'
features_tested.Frontend IVS tab: PASSED - Create form with name input, type select, latency select, create button
features_tested.Frontend MediaPackage tab: PASSED - Create channel form and create endpoint form present
features_tested.Frontend navigation: PASSED - 'Live Streaming' link in Tools dropdown navigates to /aws-livestream
